properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: It's been quite a journey from Calv'ry The road wasn't easy There were burdens to bear But He'll keep His promise That He'll do it for us He'll cross us over upon full surrender When we give Him our all He'll take control Then we will conquer And we will not fall

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: In the evening time We'll shine He'll be the light within us Working through us Even in the storm We'll rise Resting in our hope in Jesus We'll be victorious today

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: The world's getting darker around us We're raging against an invisible war But He's given us something Through a grace that's amazing His Holy Spirit Oh we have to receive it When the battle is won We'll face the One Who has led us this far It would be worth it all

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: One sweet day There will be a celebration All our tears wipe away And we'll rest in His embrace But for now we'll sing an anthem of praise
